value.Message: (15/3)07:42 Accident involving 3 vehicles on PIE (towards Airport) after Bedok North Ave 4 exit. Right 2 lanes blocked. Expect heavy delays.
(15/3)06:00 Road works on CTE (towards Ang Mo Kio) between Braddell Rd and Thomson Rd exits. Left lane closed until 22:00.
(15/3)08:15 Vehicle breakdown on AYE (towards Tuas) after Clementi Ave 6 exit. Road shoulder blocked. Slow traffic.
(15/3)08:30 Accident on TPE (towards PIE) after Tampines Ave 10 exit. Road shoulder and left lane affected. Ambulance on-site.
(15/3)00:00 Ongoing road resurfacing on ECP (towards Marina Coastal Expressway) between Changi Coast Rd and Airport Blvd. Partial lane closure.
(15/3)07:55 Multi-vehicle accident on SLE (towards KJE) after Woodlands Ave 2 exit. All lanes moving slowly. Police on-site.
(15/3)08:02 Heavy vehicle breakdown on KPE (towards ECP) after Upper Changi Rd North exit. Centre lane blocked. Traffic building up.
(15/3)08:10 Heavy rain reported along AYE (both directions) near West Coast Hwy. Reduced visibility. Drive slowly and maintain safe following distance.
(15/3)07:00 Utility works on Orchard Rd (towards Dhoby Ghaut) near Scotts Rd junction. Left lane closed. Valid until 20:00.
(15/3)08:22 Accident on Tampines Ave 10 near Tampines Mall. Vehicles involved: 2 cars. Right lane blocked.
(15/3)07:48 Vehicle stalled on BKE (towards PIE) after Woodlands Ave 12 exit. Road shoulder affected. Slight delays.
(15/3)08:05 Debris on MCE (towards ECP) near Marina South Pier exit. Road shoulder affected. Tow truck dispatched.
(15/3)08:35 Accident on CTE (towards City) after Braddell Rd exit. Motorcyclist involved. Left lane and road shoulder blocked. Ambulance activated.
(15/3)09:00 Sewer maintenance on Clementi Ave 3 near Clementi MRT. Single lane operation from 09:00 to 18:00.
(15/3)08:18 Flash flood advisory for Woodlands Ave 12 near Marsiling Rd. Water pooling on road. Proceed with caution.
(15/3)07:30 Rear-end collision on Nicoll Highway (towards ECP) near Mountbatten Rd. Right lane affected.
(15/3)08:40 Bus breakdown on TPE (towards CTE) after Pasir Ris Dr 3 exit. Road shoulder affected. Recovery vehicle en route.
(15/3)08:00 MRT tunnelling works on Shenton Way near Maxwell Rd. Temporary lane narrowing until further notice.
(15/3)08:50 Accident at Upper Thomson Rd / Marymount Rd junction. Vehicles blocking intersection. Police directing traffic.
(15/3)08:12 Fallen tree on Bedok North Ave 3 near Bedok Interchange. Right lane blocked. Clearance crew on-site.
(15/3)08:00 Thunderstorm warning in effect for northeast Singapore. Drivers along TPE and SLE advised to drive cautiously and reduce speed.
(15/3)07:00 Resurfacing works on West Coast Hwy (towards AYE) near West Coast Dr. Two right lanes closed until 15:00.
(15/3)08:55 Motorcycle accident on ECP (towards City) after Fort Road exit. Road shoulder blocked.
(15/3)08:28 Lorry breakdown on AYE (towards City) near Jurong East Ave 1. Leftmost lane blocked. Tow truck dispatched.
(15/3)09:10 Special event causing road diversions near Padang / St Andrew's Rd. Multiple roads closed. Follow police direction.
